inputs.label: standard
inputs.source: National Labor Statistics Bureau, 2025 Annual Survey
inputs.finding: Technology sector leads at 72% remote, while manufacturing is lowest at 8%. The median across all sectors is 34%.

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.categories: Government spending by category: Health 31%, Education 22%, Defence 18%, Infrastructure 12%, Other 17%
inputs.finding: Health spending exceeds education and defence combined.

inputs.label: european
inputs.chart_type: Grouped bar chart with two bars per country
inputs.y_axis: Percentage of population with broadband access
inputs.finding: The urban-rural broadband gap has narrowed in Western Europe but widened in Eastern Europe. Romania's rural broadband access is 38%, compared to 91% urban — the widest gap in the EU.
